summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Gold Jewellery Sales application following all specified test scenarios. Backend API shows 84% success rate with minor item name conflicts. Frontend completely functional with full workflow from admin setup to executive billing. All critical user journeys working properly.

minor_issues.issue: Item names already exist error during creation (expected behavior)
minor_issues.impact: No impact - existing item names work fine

passed_tests: Admin Dashboard with KPI cards and quick actions
Rate Management - Set 22KT Normal rate to 55000
User Management - Create executive (exec1/exec123, Raj Kumar, executive role, Mumbai Showroom branch)
Item Names Management - Verified items: Necklace, Ring, Bangle, Pendant, Earring
Executive Dashboard - Customer form with name, phone, location, reference
Item details form (item name selection, weight entry)
Real-time gold value calculation (₹55,000 for 10g at 22KT)
Total item calculation with making charges
